title: On elliptic differential operators with shifts: II. The cohomological   index formula
summary:
This paper is a continuation of arXiv:0706.3511, where we obtained a local
index formula for matrix elliptic operators with shifts. Here we establish a
cohomological index formula of Atiyah-Singer type for elliptic differential
operators with shifts acting between section spaces of arbitrary vector
bundles. The key step is the construction of closed graded traces on certain
differential algebras over the symbol algebra for this class of operators.
